title: Listeler ve Tuple'lar
subtitle: Liste ve tuple islemleri, dilimleme.
code:
numbers = [10, 25, 3, 47, 8]
print("Orijinal liste:", numbers)

numbers.sort()
print("Siralanmis:", numbers)

numbers.append(100)
print("Eleman eklendi:", numbers)

numbers.remove(3)
print("3 silindi:", numbers)

# Dilimleme (slicing)
print("\nDilimleme:")
print("Ilk 3 eleman:", numbers[:3])
print("Son 2 eleman:", numbers[-2:])
print("Ters cevrilmis:", numbers[::-1])

# Tuple - degistirilemez
point = (3, 4)
print("\nTuple:", point)
print("x =", point[0], ", y =", point[1])

# Tuple unpacking
x, y = point
print("Unpacked:", x, y)

# Liste icinde liste (matris)
matrix = [[1, 2], [3, 4], [5, 6]]
print("\nMatris:")
for row in matrix:
    print(row)
